title: panicum tumidum
intro: Panicum tumidum, also known as fat-hen or fat-hen millet, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Panicum tumidum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
